parameters.query:
SELECT
    s.hospital_id,
    h.hospital_name,
    s.record_date,
    s.patient_name,
    s.brand,
    s.product_model,
    s.ear_side,
    s.sale_price,
    h.revenue_share_rate,
    ROUND(s.sale_price * h.revenue_share_rate, 0) AS hospital_share
FROM clinic_sales_records s
JOIN hospitals h ON s.hospital_id = h.hospital_id
WHERE s.transaction_type = 'Fitting Completed'
  AND s.record_date >= '{{ $json.dateFrom }}'
  AND s.record_date <= '{{ $json.dateTo }}'
ORDER BY h.hospital_name, s.record_date;

SELECT
    s.record_date,
    h.hospital_name,
    s.patient_name,
    s.product_model,
    s.ear_side,
    s.transaction_type,
    s.sale_price,
    s.repair_fee,
    ROUND(s.sale_price * (1 - h.revenue_share_rate), 0) AS our_sales_share,
    s.repair_fee AS exclusive_repair_revenue
FROM clinic_sales_records s
JOIN hospitals h ON s.hospital_id = h.hospital_id
WHERE s.brand = 'ReSound'
  AND s.transaction_type IN ('Fitting Completed', 'Repair Completed')
  AND s.record_date >= '{{ $json.dateFrom }}'
  AND s.record_date <= '{{ $json.dateTo }}'
ORDER BY s.record_date;

SELECT
    s.record_date,
    h.hospital_name,
    s.patient_name,
    s.brand,
    s.product_model,
    s.ear_side,
    s.transaction_type,
    s.sale_price,
    s.repair_fee
FROM clinic_sales_records s
JOIN hospitals h ON s.hospital_id = h.hospital_id
WHERE s.brand IN ('Phonak', 'Signia', 'Widex')
  AND s.transaction_type IN ('Fitting Completed', 'Repair Completed')
  AND s.record_date >= '{{ $json.dateFrom }}'
  AND s.record_date <= '{{ $json.dateTo }}'
ORDER BY s.brand, s.record_date;

parameters.subject: =Hospital Settlement Report - {{ $json.monthLabel }}
parameters.message:
=

Dear {{ $json.hospital_name }},

Please find attached your hearing aid settlement report for {{ $json.monthLabel }}.

Total Sales NZD {{ $json.totalSalePrice }}
Your Revenue Share NZD {{ $json.totalHospitalShare }}

Please do not hesitate to contact us if you have any questions.

Kind regards,
Daisy Song
Hearing Clinic
